title: HTML Iframes
content:
### HTML Iframes An **iframe** (inline frame) embeds another HTML page inside the current page. --- ### Basic Iframe ```html ``` --- ### Iframe Attributes | Attribute | Description | |-----------|-------------| | `src` | URL of the page to embed | | `title` | Accessible name (required!) | | `width` | Width in pixels | | `height` | Height in pixels | | `frameborder` | Border (0 or 1, deprecated) | | `allow` | Feature permissions | | `loading` | Lazy loading (`lazy`, `eager`) | | `sandbox` | Security restrictions | | `name` | Target name for links | --- ### Iframe Size ```html ``` --- ### Iframe as Link Target ```html

Load example.com in iframe

``` --- ### The `sandbox` Attribute Adds security restrictions: ```html ``` | Value | Allows | |-------|--------| | (empty) | All restrictions | | `allow-scripts` | JavaScript | | `allow-forms` | Form submission | | `allow-popups` | Pop-up windows | | `allow-same-origin` | Same-origin access | --- > **Security Note:** Iframes can be a security risk. Use `sandbox` when embedding third-party content. Always provide `title` for accessibility.
